productDisplayName: Ant Kids Boy's Blue Grey Kidswear
description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with blue ribbed neckline, blue sleeves, twill tape detailing with studs on the right shoulder and left hem, and graphic with stud detailing on the left side  FittingComfortWash careWash separately with mild detergentDo not bleachDry flat in shadeDo not iron directly on print or embroideryDry clean preferredBring out the biker in your little one in this cool grey tee from ant. The soft cotton fabric will keep him feeling fresh and comfortable all day long, while he enjoys those wondrous moments with you in style.
